name: Icarus Mod Editor
author: Jimk72
body_html: Allows creation of mods and installation into Icarus game.

name: Icarus Mod Editor Tool
author: Zayon
body_html: This is only for users modding with IMM (icarus Mod Manager by Jimk72), is heavily dependent on it because uses all data from it.

name: Icarus Mod Manager 2 Full
author: Jimk72
body_html: Full Release. Icarus Mod Manager 2.4.0 this is not backwards compatible with previous 1.6.7 or earlier versions! The folder structure has changed. Please create a new folder for this to be unzipped into. Make sure you click check for update after installed.
